author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Plan: 1) Locate the 'sync: auto-stage dirty hub state' string to find originator. 2) Audit shared_writer/core.rs (per prior-art #466). 3) Verify all git operations that emit this commit explicitly bind to hub-cache via -C or by chdir/git-dir, not ambient cwd. 4) Add branch-prefix hard-block per issue suggestion: refuse to commit hub-recovery content if HEAD branch is not the tracker branch. 5) Write a regression test.
